name: KARTE
description: Japans CX platform from PLAID — real-time customer analytics, personalization, and engagement APIs.

seo.title: KARTE — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: KARTE: Japans CX platform from PLAID — real-time customer analytics, personalization, and engagement APIs.

when_to_use: Real-time CX personalization for Japanese e-commerce
Customer journey visualization for retention analysis
Behavioral trigger for in-app engagement campaigns
360-degree customer analytics for Japanese retail brands
API-driven personalization for omnichannel CX strategy

pros: Strong presence and support in Japan
APIs for custom engagement use cases
Integrates well with Japanese martech stack
cons: English docs and sales support limited
Complex pricing tied to traffic and features
review.verdict: Leading Japanese CX platform with deep local fit; hard to justify outside the JP market.
review.best_for: Japanese brands wanting real-time personalization with local CX platform support.
review.not_for: Non-JP companies or teams wanting warehouse-native composable analytics.
